description: Malaysian PPE safety regulations consolidated from BOWEC 1986, OSHA 1994, JKR Standard Specifications, USECHH 2000, CIDB CIS 22:2021, and Malaysian Standards (MS).

hardhat.hazard: Exposure to falling objects (timber piles, debris) or impact with fixed structures in a mandatory Hard Hat Zone.
hardhat.risk: Fatal/Severe: Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI), skull fracture, or concussion from overhead debris.
hardhat.corrective_action: Stop work immediately. Issue MS 183:2001 certified industrial safety helmet. Verify chin strap is fastened. Sun hats/caps are PROHIBITED.
hardhat.legal_citation: BOWEC 1986, Reg. 24: Mandatory head protection on construction sites.
hardhat.technical_standard: MS 183:2001: Specifications for industrial safety helmets (min. 4.9kN impact resistance).
hardhat.requirement: Personnel must wear MS 183:2001 certified industrial safety helmets (at least 4.9kN impact resistance). Sun hats/caps are PROHIBITED.
hardhat.penalty: Violation of OSHA 1994 Section 15. Mandatory fine up to RM 50,000 or 2 years imprisonment for failing to provide safe equipment.

safety_vest.hazard: Failure to be visible to operators of mobile plant (excavators, lorries) and passing traffic on roadside sites.
safety_vest.risk: Fatal: Struck-by-vehicle incident from lorry, excavator, or passing traffic near roadside work zones.
safety_vest.corrective_action: Worker must immediately wear SIRIM-certified neon vest with retroreflective strips. HIGH RISK of being struck if not visible.
safety_vest.legal_citation: JKR Standard Spec (Section A): High-viz required near plant/traffic.
safety_vest.technical_standard: MS 1731:2004: Retroreflective materials for high-visibility safety vests (Class 2 Minimum, visible from 200m).
safety_vest.regulation_ref: JKR Std Spec Sec A / MS 1731:2004
safety_vest.requirement: Workers must wear SIRIM-certified neon vests with retroreflective strips visible from 200m (Class 2 Minimum).
safety_vest.penalty: Violation of JKR Standard Specification Section A. Mandatory fine up to RM 50,000 under Section 15 of OSHA 1994 for failing to provide a safe system of work.

mask.hazard: Inhalation of hazardous construction dusts (silica from concrete, wood particles from timber handling) or fumes.
mask.risk: Chronic/Acute: Respiratory impairment (Silicosis, Asthma) or lung damage from prolonged dust exposure.
mask.corrective_action: Stop exposure to dust/fumes immediately. Provide N95/P2 particulate mask compliant with MS 2323:2010.
mask.legal_citation: USECHH Regulations 2000: Control of exposure to hazardous chemicals.
mask.technical_standard: MS 2323:2010: Respiratory protective devices - Selection, use and maintenance.
mask.requirement: Workers exposed to construction dusts must wear MS 2323:2010 compliant respirators (Min. N95/P2 class).
mask.penalty: Violation of USECHH Regulations 2000. Fine up to RM 10,000 or 1 year imprisonment.

gloves.hazard: Direct contact with abrasive materials, sharp edges (rebar), or corrosive substances.
gloves.risk: Moderate: Lacerations, chemical burns, punctures, or dermatitis.
gloves.corrective_action: Issue task-specific hand protection: cut-resistant gloves for rebar handling, chemical-resistant gloves for wet works.
gloves.legal_citation: OSHA 1994 Section 15: Employer duty to provide suitable PPE.
gloves.requirement: Suitable hand protection (MS 2097) must be worn when handling abrasive, sharp, or hazardous materials.
gloves.penalty: General penalty under OSHA 1994 Section 15: Fine up to RM 50,000.

goggles.hazard: Exposure to flying particles (grinding/chipping), chemical splashes, or intense light emissions.
goggles.risk: Severe: Corneal abrasion, chemical eye burns, or permanent vision loss.
goggles.corrective_action: Issue MS 2050 compliant eye protection appropriate for the specific task (welding, cutting, grinding).
goggles.legal_citation: BOWEC 1986 Reg. 13: Eye protection for hazardous processes.
goggles.technical_standard: MS 2050: Eye protectors for industrial use.
goggles.requirement: Eye protection (MS 2050) is mandatory for processes involving flying particles (welding, cutting, grinding).
goggles.penalty: Strict liability offense under FMA 1967. Fine up to RM 5,000.

footwear.hazard: Foot exposure to sharp objects (nails), crushing weights, or uneven terrain/slip hazards.
footwear.risk: Serious: Crushed toes, puncture wounds (tetanus risk), or skeletal fractures.
footwear.corrective_action: Enforce MS ISO 20345 safety boots with steel toe. Slippers, sandals, and sneakers are PROHIBITED on site.
footwear.legal_citation: BOWEC 1986 Reg. 15: Safety footwear mandatory on construction sites.
footwear.technical_standard: MS ISO 20345: Personal protective equipment - Safety footwear (200J toe protection, penetration resistance).
footwear.requirement: Safety footwear (MS ISO 20345) with toe protection (200J) and penetration resistance is MANDATORY. Slippers/sneakers are prohibited.
footwear.penalty: Violation of BOWEC Reg 15. Fine up to RM 5,000.

harness.hazard: Working at height (>2m) without fall arrest system or improper anchorage.
harness.risk: Fatal: Fall from height resulting in death or catastrophic injury.
harness.corrective_action: STOP WORK IMMEDIATELY. Equip worker with MS 2311 full-body harness with secure anchorage before resuming any work at height.
harness.legal_citation: BOWEC 1986 Reg. 12: Fall protection mandatory for work at height.
harness.technical_standard: MS 2311: Full-body harness for fall arrest systems.
harness.requirement: Full-body harness (MS 2311) with secure anchorage is mandatory for all work at height >2m.
harness.penalty: Immediate Prohibition Notice. Fine up to RM 50,000 under OSHA 1994.

requirements: High Visibility Vest (MS 1731:2004, Class 2 minimum) is MANDATORY
Advance Warning Signs, Safety Cones, and Flagmen required
No work without JKR ATJ 2C/85 compliant traffic control devices
Roadside Work Zone.penalty: Major offense under OSHA 1994 Section 15. Fine up to RM 50,000 or 2 years imprisonment.

requirements: Safety Harness (MS 2311) is MANDATORY for work >2m
Scaffold must comply with BOWEC 1986 standards
Edge protection and toe boards required
Work at Height.penalty: Immediate Prohibition Notice. Fine up to RM 50,000.

Excavation / Trenching.primary_regulation: DOSH Guidelines on Trenching and Excavation
Excavation / Trenching.penalty: Violation of OSHA 1994. Fine up to RM 50,000.

requirements: Personal fall protection for work at height
Construction Site.penalty: Violation of BOWEC 1986 and OSHA 1994 Section 15.

requirements: PPE as determined by risk assessment
Employer must provide safe system of work (Section 15)
Workers must cooperate with safety measures (Section 24)
General Workspace.penalty: General penalty under OSHA 1994 Section 15: Fine up to RM 50,000.

acronyms.BOWEC: Building Operations and Works of Engineering Construction (Safety) Regulations 1986
acronyms.JKR: Jabatan Kerja Raya (Public Works Department of Malaysia)
acronyms.DOSH: Department of Occupational Safety and Health, Malaysia
acronyms.USECHH: Use and Standards of Exposure of Chemicals Hazardous to Health Regulations 2000
acronyms.MS: Malaysian Standard (published by SIRIM/Department of Standards Malaysia)
